description_long: This is a modern, two-story residential house with a flat roof and a symmetrical facade. The front features a central entryway flanked by large vertical windows and two recessed balconies on either side, each with partial privacy walls. The exterior combines horizontal wood paneling with smooth, light-colored surfaces, giving it a contemporary look. The landscaping includes two small shrubs near the entrance, and a wide concrete walkway leads up to the main door. The side and rear elevations are simpler, with continuous wood paneling and minimal window openings. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, wood paneling, large vertical windows, and recessed balconies, featuring a central entryway and clean geometric lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large vertical windows, two recessed balconies, and landscaping with shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the horizontal wood paneling and the depth of the balconies and entryway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a continuous expanse of wood paneling with minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the side profile and the walkway leading to the entry.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large vertical windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central double-door entry with a wide concrete walkway, flanked by vertical windows and minimal landscaping
